# Yurekh Solutions

> Full-system business building studio. Strategy, legal, technology, branding, and go-to-market as one integrated system. Global presence across 6 countries.

## What is Yurekh Solutions?

Yurekh Solutions is a senior-led business building studio working across strategy, legal compliance, technology development, brand identity, and go-to-market as one integrated system. We partner with founders and leadership teams to build new businesses from scratch and thoughtfully scale what already exists.

## Global Presence

**IND ⋅ DXB  NYC ⋅ SGP ⋅ LDN ⋅ SYD**

Registered offices in India, UAE, United States, United Kingdom, Singapore, and Australia. Team is globally distributed and engagements span across continents.

## Services

### Business Strategy & Formation
- Company registration and legal structure setup
- Compliance frameworks and corporate governance
- Business model design and financial planning
- Market research and competitive analysis
- Go-to-market strategy

### Legal & Compliance
- Business registration (India, UAE, US, UK, Singapore)
- Tax structuring and regulatory compliance
- IP protection and contracts
- Ongoing legal advisory

### Brand Identity & Design
- Brand strategy and positioning
- Visual identity and logo design
- Brand guidelines and messaging framework
- Packaging design
- Photography direction

### Technology Development
- SaaS platform development
- Custom CRM systems
- AI chatbots and automation
- Mobile applications (iOS & Android)
- E-commerce platforms
- Custom enterprise software
- Cloud infrastructure and API development
- AI/ML integration

### Digital Marketing & Growth
- SEO and content marketing
- Social media strategy and management
- Performance marketing and paid advertising
- Email marketing automation
- Analytics and conversion optimization

### Go-to-Market
- Launch planning and execution
- PR and media outreach
- Partnership development
- Customer acquisition strategy

### Brand Custodianship
Post-launch ongoing support including:
- Monthly business pulse reports
- Strategic sessions with partner principal
- A/B testing protocols
- Performance measurement
- Vendor introductions
- Hiring support
- Investor and operator introductions

## Who We Work With

### For Founders
You have a vision and a market opportunity. We become your founding team—handling everything from company registration and legal compliance to brand identity, technology infrastructure, and market launch.

### For Existing Businesses
Your business is ready for the next level. We help established companies transform their brand, enter new markets, launch new products, and build technology infrastructure for global scale.

## Industries Served

- Technology & SaaS
- E-Commerce & Retail
- Healthcare & Pharma
- Finance & FinTech
- Real Estate
- Education & EdTech
- Food & Beverage
- Manufacturing
- Hospitality
- Media & Entertainment

## Engagement Model

### Typical Length
- Early-stage: 12-18 months or longer
- First 3-4 months: Core business build
- Ongoing: Brand custodianship and growth support

### Pricing Models
- Project-based fees for defined scopes
- Monthly retainer for ongoing custodianship
- Equity participation in select early-stage companies
- Hybrid models combining fees and equity

### Team Structure
Partner Principal model: A senior partner leads every engagement end-to-end, supported by a core team of senior operators. Behind the studio is a decade-long vendor and advisor network.

## Track Record

- **200+ Brands** built and scaled
- **$500M+ Enterprise Value** created
- **6+ Countries** served
- **50+ Industry Specialists** on team

## How to Start

Through the Book a Consultation form at https://yurekh.com/bookingform or by calling +91 91362 42706. Our team reviews every inquiry before suggesting next steps.

## Key Differentiators

1. **Full-Stack Partner** - Legal, strategy, technology, branding, and marketing as one integrated system
2. **Senior-Led** - Every engagement led by experienced operators, not juniors
3. **Global Reach** - 6 countries, multiple time zones, diverse regulatory environments
4. **Long-Term Partnership** - Brand custodianship post-launch, not just project completion
5. **Selective Acceptance** - We work with businesses we genuinely believe in
6. **Flexible Models** - Fees, retainer, equity, or hybrid arrangements
